turns.name: CHIEF JUSTICE REHNQUIST
turns.text: The opinion of the Court in No. 89-1715 Burns against Reed will be announced by Justice White.

turns.name: JUSTICE WHITE
turns.text: For the reasons stated in an opinion on file with the clerk, the judgment of the Court of Appeals for the Seventh Circuit in this case is affirmed in part and reversed in part. Justice Scalia joined by Justice Blackmun has filed a dissenting opinion. And Justice Marshall has joined part III of Justice Scalia's opinion.
